world.name: herbst-mud
world.title: Herbst MUD
world.description: The default Herbst MUD world with cross-shaped starting area and junkyard zone.

rooms.name: The Hole
rooms.description: The central hub of the cross-shaped paths. This is where everything connects.

rooms.name: Northern Path
rooms.description: A path leading north from the center.

rooms.name: Southern Path
rooms.description: A path leading south from the center.

rooms.name: Training Room
rooms.description: A simple training room with padded floors and wooden dummies. This is a safe place to practice combat skills.

rooms.name: Western Path
rooms.description: A path leading west from the center.

npcs.name: Gizmo
npcs.description: A friendly half-dog creature with soulful eyes and wagging tail. Looks eager to help.
npcs.greeting: Welcome, new traveler! I'm Gizmo, here to help you get started.

npcs.name: Combat Dummy
npcs.description: A wooden training dummy. It takes damage but never dies.

abilities.name: knives
abilities.description: Proficiency with daggers, sais, small blades

items.name: tiny green potion
items.description: A tiny green glass vial containing a weak healing elixir. Restores 15 HP when consumed.

items.name: small green potion
items.description: A small green glass vial containing a healing elixir. Restores 25 HP when consumed.

races.name: human
races.description: A regular human survivor. Balanced and adaptable.

races.name: turtle
races.description: A mutant turtle with a hard shell and slow but sturdy nature. +2 CON.

races.name: mutant
races.description: A strange mutant with unusual abilities. +2 INT, +1 STR.
